{{CargoRelic
|name=Pear Basket
|class_id=20004
|rank=Green
|affct=CIV
|source= Upgrading Kiddo Kong Rong to T9 in [[Cathay Generals]].
|description=This basket produced in Shandong can greatly extend the shelf life of pears. As a pear enthusiast, Kong Rong knew that moderate-sized pears are the freshest and sweetest. Therefore, he was always "kind" enough to share the larger pears with his family so he can enjoy the tasty ones alone.
|fame=10
|art=18
|fth=17
|civ=30
|tech=15
|ss1=Per 200 Pears consumed, Snail HP +10<br>Pears Consumed: 4000/4000
|ss2=Per 200 Pears consumed, Snail HP +20<br>Pears Consumed: 4000/4000
|ss3=Per 200 Pears consumed, Snail HP +30<br>Pears Consumed: 4000/4000
|ss4=Per 200 Pears consumed, Snail HP +30<br>Pears Consumed: 4000/4000
|ss7=Per 200 Pears consumed, Snail HP +30<br>Pears Consumed: 4000/4000<br> (Awakened)
}}
